endpoints.name: GET /api
endpoints.description: Returns the swagger specification for the API.

endpoints.name: GET /api/projects/{id}{.format}
endpoints.description: Returns information about a specific technology project.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{.FORMAT}} with a real .format.

endpoints.name: GET /api/projects{.format}
endpoints.description: Returns a list of available technology project IDs.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{.FORMAT}} with a real .format.
